testcase.name: test_get_today_session
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_data_loss_fix.py:32: in test_get_today_session assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_today_session_stable_across_calls
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_data_loss_fix.py:41: in test_today_session_stable_across_calls assert r1.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_finish_session_then_today_still_returns_same_session
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_data_loss_fix.py:58: in test_finish_session_then_today_still_returns_same_session assert r_before.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_log_list_accessible
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_data_loss_fix.py:87: in test_log_list_accessible assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_log_create_and_retrieve
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_data_loss_fix.py:106: in test_log_create_and_retrieve assert resp.status_code in (200, 201), f"Log creation failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Log creation failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","week"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"exercise":"TEST_Bench Press","weight":315.0,"reps":5,"setIndex":0,"date":"2026-04-17","sessionType":"Heavy Upper"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","day"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"exercise":"TEST_Bench Press","weight":315.0,"reps":5,"setIndex":0,"date":"2026-04-17","sessionType":"Heavy Upper"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","sets"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"exercise":"TEST_Bench Press","weight":315.0,"reps":5,"setIndex":0,"date":"2026-04-17","sessionType":"Heavy Upper"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","rpe"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"exercise":"TEST_Bench Press","weight":315.0,"reps":5,"setIndex":0,"date":"2026-04-17","sessionType":"Heavy Upper"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","pain"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"exercise":"TEST_Bench Press","weight":315.0,"reps":5,"setIndex":0,"date":"2026-04-17","sessionType":"Heavy Upper"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","completed"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"exercise":"TEST_Bench Press","weight":315.0,"reps":5,"setIndex":0,"date":"2026-04-17","sessionType":"Heavy Upper"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
